name: java-pro
description: Master Java 21+ with modern features like virtual threads, pattern
capabilities: Design applications using Java 21+ features like virtual threads, pattern matching, and sealed classes
Implement Spring Boot 3.x microservices with Spring Security 6 and OAuth2 authentication
Optimize JVM performance with GraalVM Native Image and garbage collection tuning
Apply enterprise architecture patterns including DDD, CQRS, and hexagonal architecture
Create comprehensive test strategies with JUnit 5, Testcontainers, and Spring Boot Test
Configure cloud-native deployments with Docker, Kubernetes, and distributed tracing
author: sickn33
securitySummary: This is a prompt-only skill with no executable code. Static analysis scanned 0 files and found 0 security issues. The skill provides AI instructions for Java 21+ development guidance with no network access, file system operations, or external command execution capabilities.
valueStatement: Java developers struggle with adopting modern Java 21+ features and Spring Boot 3.x best practices. This skill provides expert guidance on virtual threads, cloud-native patterns, and enterprise architecture.
userTitle: Build Modern Java 21+ Applications with Spring Boot 3.x
limitations: Cannot execute Java code or run applications directly
Cannot access external systems, databases, or build tools
Recommendations are based on documented best practices up to training cutoff
Cannot perform actual performance testing or profiling

useCases.targetUser: Senior Java developers maintaining enterprise applications
useCases.title: Migrate Legacy Java Application to Java 21
useCases.description: Get step-by-step guidance for upgrading from Java 8 or 11 to Java 21, including virtual thread migration, module system updates, and dependency compatibility checks.

useCases.title: Build Cloud-Native Microservices with Spring Boot 3
useCases.description: Design and implement microservices architecture with Spring Cloud, resilience patterns, distributed tracing, and Kubernetes deployment configurations.

useCases.title: Optimize JVM Performance for Production Workloads
useCases.description: Receive JVM tuning recommendations, garbage collection optimization strategies, and GraalVM native compilation guidance for improved startup and memory efficiency.

promptTemplates.title: Java 21 Feature Adoption
promptTemplates.prompt: I'm currently using Java 11 in my Spring Boot application. Help me identify the top 5 Java 21 features that would provide the most value for my REST API service, and show me how to implement virtual threads for better concurrency.
promptTemplates.scenario: Developer upgrading from older Java LTS version

promptTemplates.title: Spring Boot 3 Migration
promptTemplates.prompt: I need to migrate my Spring Boot 2.7 application to Spring Boot 3.x with Java 21. Create a migration checklist covering Jakarta EE namespace changes, Spring Security 6 updates, and any breaking changes I should address.

promptTemplates.title: Microservices Architecture Design
promptTemplates.prompt: Design a microservices architecture for an e-commerce platform using Spring Boot 3 and Spring Cloud. Include service boundaries, inter-service communication patterns, circuit breaker configuration with Resilience4j, and distributed tracing setup with Micrometer.

promptTemplates.title: GraalVM Native Image Optimization
promptTemplates.prompt: My Spring Boot application has slow container startup times. Guide me through creating a GraalVM native image build, including reflection configuration, dependency exclusions, and performance benchmarking with JMH.

bestPractices: Always use virtual threads for I/O-bound operations to maximize throughput without thread pool tuning
Leverage pattern matching and sealed classes to reduce boilerplate and improve type safety
Configure GraalVM native image builds for Lambda functions and containerized microservices to reduce cold start times
antiPatterns: Using platform thread pools with fixed sizes when virtual threads can handle massive concurrency
Mixing Java 21 features with legacy patterns that prevent compile-time optimization
Skipping integration tests when adopting new Java or Spring Boot features

faq.question: What Java version do I need to use this skill effectively?
faq.answer: This skill focuses on Java 21+ LTS features. You can use it with Java 17 or 11, but some recommendations may require upgrading to access virtual threads and pattern matching features.

faq.question: Does this skill help with Spring Boot 3 migration?
faq.answer: Yes. It provides migration guidance covering Jakarta EE namespace changes, Spring Security 6 updates, and compatibility considerations for upgrading from Spring Boot 2.x.

faq.question: Can this skill generate working Java code?
faq.answer: Yes. It can generate code examples, configuration files, and implementation patterns. However, you must integrate and test the code in your specific environment.

faq.question: What cloud platforms does this skill support?
faq.answer: The skill provides cloud-agnostic guidance for Docker and Kubernetes deployments. Recommendations apply to AWS, GCP, Azure, and on-premise container orchestration.

faq.question: Does this skill cover testing strategies?
faq.answer: Yes. It covers JUnit 5, Mockito, Spring Boot Test, Testcontainers for integration testing, and contract testing with Spring Cloud Contract.

faq.question: Can this skill help with JVM performance tuning?
faq.answer: Yes. It provides garbage collection optimization, memory profiling guidance, JIT compiler tuning, and GraalVM native image compilation recommendations.
